answer: The five lowest food establishment inspection scores in Austin this year are: Musashino Sushi Dokoro with a score of 58 on January 15, WakeSurf Saloon with a score of 60 on January 8, BC - Cafe Blue with a score of 61 on April 9, Ho Ho Chinese Restaurant with a score of 62 on January 21, and First Chinese BBQ with a score of 65 on January 15. These scores reflect routine inspections conducted in 2026.
